root_text.an7.54:1.1: Atha kho aññataro bhikkhu yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho so bhikkhu bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.an7.54:1.2: “ko nu kho, bhante, hetu ko paccayo yena sutavato ariyasāvakassa vicikicchā nuppajjati abyākatavatthūsū”ti?
root_text.an7.54:2.1: “Diṭṭhinirodhā kho, bhikkhu, sutavato ariyasāvakassa vicikicchā nuppajjati abyākatavatthūsu.
root_text.an7.54:2.2: ‘Hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā’ti kho, bhikkhu, diṭṭhigatametaṁ;
root_text.an7.54:2.3: ‘na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā’ti kho, bhikkhu, diṭṭhigatametaṁ;
root_text.an7.54:2.4: ‘hoti ca na ca hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā’ti kho, bhikkhu, diṭṭhigatametaṁ;
root_text.an7.54:2.5: ‘neva hoti na na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā’ti kho, bhikkhu, diṭṭhigatametaṁ.
root_text.an7.54:2.6: Assutavā, bhikkhu, puthujjano diṭṭhiṁ nappajānāti, diṭṭhisamudayaṁ nappajānāti, diṭṭhinirodhaṁ nappajānāti, diṭṭhinirodhagāminiṁ paṭipadaṁ nappajānāti.
root_text.an7.54:2.7: Tassa sā diṭṭhi pavaḍḍhati, so na parimuccati jātiyā jarāya maraṇena sokehi paridevehi dukkhehi domanassehi upāyāsehi. ‘Na parimuccati dukkhasmā’ti vadāmi.
root_text.an7.54:3.1: Sutavā ca kho, bhikkhu, ariyasāvako diṭṭhiṁ pajānāti, diṭṭhisamudayaṁ pajānāti, diṭṭhinirodhaṁ pajānāti, diṭṭhinirodhagāminiṁ paṭipadaṁ pajānāti.
root_text.an7.54:3.2: Tassa sā diṭṭhi nirujjhati, so parimuccati jātiyā jarāya maraṇena sokehi paridevehi dukkhehi domanassehi upāyāsehi. ‘Parimuccati dukkhasmā’ti vadāmi.
root_text.an7.54:3.3: Evaṁ jānaṁ kho, bhikkhu, sutavā ariyasāvako evaṁ passaṁ ‘hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā’tipi na byākaroti;
root_text.an7.54:3.4: ‘na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā’tipi na byākaroti;
root_text.an7.54:3.5: ‘hoti ca na ca hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā’tipi na byākaroti;
root_text.an7.54:3.6: ‘neva hoti na na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā’tipi na byākaroti.
root_text.an7.54:3.7: Evaṁ jānaṁ kho, bhikkhu, sutavā ariyasāvako evaṁ passaṁ evaṁ abyākaraṇadhammo hoti abyākatavatthūsu.
root_text.an7.54:3.8: Evaṁ jānaṁ kho, bhikkhu, sutavā ariyasāvako evaṁ passaṁ na chambhati, na kampati, na vedhati, na santāsaṁ āpajjati abyākatavatthūsu.
root_text.an7.54:4.1: ‘Hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā’ti kho, bhikkhu, taṇhāgatametaṁ …pe…
root_text.an7.54:4.6: ‘hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā’ti kho, bhikkhu, vippaṭisāro eso;
root_text.an7.54:4.7: ‘na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā’ti kho, bhikkhu, vippaṭisāro eso;
root_text.an7.54:4.8: ‘hoti ca na ca hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā’ti kho, bhikkhu, vippaṭisāro eso;
root_text.an7.54:4.9: ‘neva hoti na na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā’ti kho, bhikkhu, vippaṭisāro eso.
root_text.an7.54:4.10: Assutavā, bhikkhu, puthujjano vippaṭisāraṁ nappajānāti, vippaṭisārasamudayaṁ nappajānāti, vippaṭisāranirodhaṁ nappajānāti, vippaṭisāranirodhagāminiṁ paṭipadaṁ nappajānāti.
root_text.an7.54:4.11: Tassa so vippaṭisāro pavaḍḍhati, so na parimuccati jātiyā jarāya maraṇena sokehi paridevehi dukkhehi domanassehi upāyāsehi. ‘Na parimuccati dukkhasmā’ti vadāmi.
root_text.an7.54:5.1: Sutavā ca kho, bhikkhu, ariyasāvako vippaṭisāraṁ pajānāti, vippaṭisārasamudayaṁ pajānāti, vippaṭisāranirodhaṁ pajānāti, vippaṭisāranirodhagāminiṁ paṭipadaṁ pajānāti.
root_text.an7.54:5.2: Tassa so vippaṭisāro nirujjhati, so parimuccati jātiyā …pe… ‘… dukkhasmā’ti vadāmi.
root_text.an7.54:5.3: Evaṁ jānaṁ kho, bhikkhu, sutavā ariyasāvako evaṁ passaṁ ‘hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā’tipi na byākaroti …pe…
root_text.an7.54:5.4: ‘neva hoti na na hoti tathāgato paraṁ maraṇā’tipi na byākaroti.
root_text.an7.54:5.5: Evaṁ jānaṁ kho, bhikkhu, sutavā ariyasāvako evaṁ passaṁ evaṁ abyākaraṇadhammo hoti abyākatavatthūsu.
root_text.an7.54:5.6: Evaṁ jānaṁ kho, bhikkhu, sutavā ariyasāvako evaṁ passaṁ na chambhati, na kampati, na vedhati, na santāsaṁ āpajjati abyākatavatthūsu.
root_text.an7.54:5.7: Ayaṁ kho, bhikkhu, hetu ayaṁ paccayo yena sutavato ariyasāvakassa vicikicchā nuppajjati abyākatavatthūsū”ti.

translation_text.an7.54:1.1: Then a mendicant went up to the Buddha, bowed, sat down to one side, and said to him:
translation_text.an7.54:1.2: “Sir, what is the cause, what is the reason why a learned noble disciple has no doubts regarding the undeclared points?”
translation_text.an7.54:2.1: “Mendicant, it’s due to the cessation of views that a learned noble disciple has no doubts regarding the undeclared points.
translation_text.an7.54:2.2: ‘A realized one still exists after death’: this is a misconception.
translation_text.an7.54:2.3: ‘A realized one no longer exists after death’: this is a misconception.
translation_text.an7.54:2.4: ‘A realized one both still exists and no longer exists after death’: this is a misconception.
translation_text.an7.54:2.5: ‘A realized one neither still exists nor no longer exists after death’: this is a misconception.
translation_text.an7.54:2.6: An unlearned ordinary person doesn’t understand views, their origin, their cessation, or the practice that leads to their cessation.
translation_text.an7.54:2.7: And so their views grow. They’re not freed from rebirth, old age, and death, from sorrow, lamentation, pain, sadness, and distress. They’re not freed from suffering, I say.
translation_text.an7.54:3.1: A learned noble disciple does understand views, their origin, their cessation, and the practice that leads to their cessation.
translation_text.an7.54:3.2: And so their views cease. They’re freed from rebirth, old age, and death, from sorrow, lamentation, pain, sadness, and distress. They’re freed from suffering, I say.
translation_text.an7.54:3.3: Knowing and seeing this, a learned noble disciple does not answer: ‘A realized one still exists after death’,
translation_text.an7.54:3.4: ‘A realized one no longer exists after death’,
translation_text.an7.54:3.5: ‘a realized one both still exists and no longer exists after death’,
translation_text.an7.54:3.6: ‘a realized one neither still exists nor no longer exists after death.’
translation_text.an7.54:3.7: Knowing and seeing this, a learned noble disciple does not declare the undeclared points.
translation_text.an7.54:3.8: Knowing and seeing this, a learned noble disciple doesn’t shake, tremble, quake, or get nervous regarding the undeclared points.
translation_text.an7.54:4.1: ‘A realized one still exists after death’: this is just about craving. …
translation_text.an7.54:4.6: ‘A realized one still exists after death’: this is a regret.
translation_text.an7.54:4.7: ‘A realized one no longer exists after death’: this is a regret.
translation_text.an7.54:4.8: ‘A realized one both still exists and no longer exists after death’: this is a regret.
translation_text.an7.54:4.9: ‘A realized one neither still exists nor no longer exists after death’: this is a regret.
translation_text.an7.54:4.10: An unlearned ordinary person doesn’t understand regrets, their origin, their cessation, or the practice that leads to their cessation.
translation_text.an7.54:4.11: And so their regrets grow. They’re not freed from rebirth, old age, and death, from sorrow, lamentation, pain, sadness, and distress. They’re not freed from suffering, I say.
translation_text.an7.54:5.1: A learned noble disciple does understand regrets, their origin, their cessation, and the practice that leads to their cessation.
translation_text.an7.54:5.2: And so their regrets cease. They’re freed from rebirth, old age, and death, from sorrow, lamentation, pain, sadness, and distress. They’re freed from suffering, I say.
translation_text.an7.54:5.3: Knowing and seeing this, a learned noble disciple does not answer: ‘A realized one still exists after death’ …
translation_text.an7.54:5.4: ‘a realized one neither still exists nor no longer exists after death.’
translation_text.an7.54:5.5: Knowing and seeing this, a learned noble disciple does not declare the undeclared points.
translation_text.an7.54:5.6: Knowing and seeing this, a learned noble disciple doesn’t shake, tremble, quake, or get nervous regarding the undeclared points.
translation_text.an7.54:5.7: This is the cause, this is the reason why a learned noble disciple has no doubts regarding the undeclared points.”

variant_text.an7.54:0.3: Abyākatasutta → paṇṇāsakāsaṅgahitā vaggā (cck, sya1ed); paṇṇāsakasaṅgahitā vaggā (sya2ed)
